overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a player character running through a rain-soaked Night City environment. The clip begins in a grassy wasteland outside the city perimeter, transitions onto a wet multi-lane road with moderate traffic, and continues through neon-lit urban streets with towering holographic advertisements and cyberpunk architecture.

agents.ego_description: running through tall grass toward the illuminated concrete wall and distant city skyline

entered.detail: large concrete barrier with mounted floodlights illuminating the facade
tall palm tree swaying in the wind and rain
futuristic city towers with glowing windows visible through the haze
uneven grassy ground with patches of dirt and tall weeds

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark, rain-soaked wasteland with the player moving through tall grass toward a massive illuminated concrete wall. Palm trees frame the sides while the distant neon glow of Night City is visible through the heavy rain and haze.

events.description: transitions from grassy terrain onto the wet asphalt road
black sedan passes by on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: running along the roadside toward the neon-lit city center, avoiding passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past with headlights on, splashing through puddles

entered.detail: wet multi-lane road with yellow dividing lines and reflective surface
large commercial building with prominent 'SOFTSYS' neon signage
skyscraper covered in vertical holographic advertisements and animated billboards
tall modern street light casting yellow-orange glow on the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The player reaches the asphalt road and continues running alongside traffic. The concrete wall falls behind as the neon-drenched skyline of Night City dominates the right side, with the distinctive SOFTSYS building and towering holographic billboards becoming prominent.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with dense commercial signage

events.description: approaching intersection with crossing traffic and active traffic signals
slight turn to the right to follow the road curvature through the intersection

agents.ego_description: navigating through the busy intersection while weaving between passing cars

notable_agents.action: white sedan crossing the intersection from left to right
black car waiting at the traffic light with brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: vertical traffic signal showing red light for vehicles
marked pedestrian crossing lines painted on the wet asphalt
cluster of bright holographic billboards and corporate logos on building facades

segments.scene_description: The player enters a dense commercial district with overwhelming neon signage and holographic advertisements. The scene features a busy intersection with multiple vehicles crossing, traffic lights, and the road surface reflecting the myriad of artificial lights through the falling rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved avenue lined with palm trees and storefronts

events.description: passing under a building overhang near an entrance archway

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curving road past palm trees and illuminated storefronts

entered.detail: row of palm trees lining the left side of the curved street
large cube-shaped holographic sign with green glowing graphics
covered walkway entrance with warm interior lighting visible

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows a curved avenue where the dense urban skyline gives way to a more open street lined with palm trees. A distinctive green neon cube sign marks a building entrance on the left as the player continues through the rain-slicked streets, with the road curving gently toward the darker parts of the city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a dark, rain-soaked wasteland into the neon-drenched heart of a futuristic metropolis. It begins with a trek through tall grass and palm trees toward a massive illuminated concrete wall, with the distant glow of the city piercing through heavy haze. As the player reaches the asphalt, the concrete barrier recedes and the scene opens up to a multi-lane road where the skyline, dominated by the SOFTSYS building and towering holographic billboards, looms overhead. The camera then pushes further into a dense commercial district, shifting from the open road to a busy intersection where rain-slicked streets reflect a chaotic array of neon signage and crossing vehicles. Finally, the environment transitions along a curved avenue where the urban density gives way to palm-lined streets and a distinctive green neon cube sign before the path winds toward the darker reaches of the city.
